topic: Implement Azure Bastion for secure VM access
key_facts:
Key benefits

 Azure Bastion provides the following benefits:

 
 Secure connectivity over TLS : Connect to VMs using RDP/SSH over TLS on port 443.

SKUs

 Azure Bastion offers four SKU tiers:

 
 Premium : Includes all Standard features plus session recording for compliance and private-only deployment.

Architecture

 Azure Bastion offers three deployment architectures:

 Private-only deployment : Premium SKU without public IP address for enhanced security.
Premium supports private-only deployment without a public IP.

Connection methods

 Azure Bastion supports multiple connection methods:

 
 Browser-based connections : Connect through the Azure portal using an HTML5 web client.
Shareable links : Create shareable links that allow users to connect to VMs without accessing the Azure portal.
Azure Bastion is deployed directly in your virtual network and supports all VMs in the virtual network using private IP addresses.
